subcodes.first_line: O Hasan! The tale of Husayn hath returned, and verily he findeth himself beneath the claws of the oppressors. Thou hast borne tribulations in the path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسن قد رجع حدیث الحسین و انه تحت مخالب الظالمین قد حملت الشدائد فی سبیل
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom
